diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: re-exports Hono class, Context, types Env ErrorHanlert Handler MiddlewareHandler Next NotFoundResponse NotFoundHanler ValidationTargets Input Schema ToSchema TypedResponse
+- Internal names noticed: imports Hono from ./hono, exports all type definitions from types/context/request/client modules
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: barrel file that exports the Hono framework class and all its typed interfaces for consumers.
+- Copy-safe detail: 53 total lines containing doc comments and 7 re-export statements from 5 different source modules.
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: defines Env Variables Bindings Next H Input BlankEnv BlankSchema Handler MiddlewareHandler NotFoundHandler ErrorHanoer HTTPResponseError interfaces. HandlerInterface supports 10+ overload signatures for get post put delete options patch all on use patterns. MiddlewareHandlerInterface and OnHandlerInterface follow identical patterns.
+- Internal names noticed: RouterRoute JSONValue IfAnyThenEmptyObject IsAny Simplify UnionToIntersection MergePath MergeSchemaPath AddSchemaIfHasResponse MergeTypedResponse MergeMiddlewareResponse IntersectNonAnyTypes ToSchema ExtractInput RemoveBlankRecord ParamKeys ParamKeyToRecord InputToDataByTarget ValidationTargets
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context ./hono-base ./utils/headers ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: giant TypeScript interface definition file declaring all handler middleware and routing types for the framework.
+- Copy-safe detail: 1450+ lines of type definitions covering request/response patterns with 10+ handler overloads each for main interfaces.
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class extending HonoBase with SmartRouter/RegExpRouter/TrieRouter fallback configuration.
+- Internal names noticed: extends HonoBase class options.router SmartRouter RegExpRouter TrieRouter BlankEnv BlankSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: thin wrapper that configures the default dual-router selection strategy with SmartRouter as primary and RegExpRouter as fallback.
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines wrapping constructor that accepts optional router configuration.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: Hono base class with get post put delete options patch all on use methods. onError notFound request fetch fire methods. route basePath mount helpers.
+- Internal names noticed: notFoundHandler errorHandler #basePath #path #notFoundHandler privateError COMPOSED_HANDLER fetch request fire METHODS METHOD_NAME_ALL METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: main implementation class that stores routes handles request dispatch and composes middleware using a router instance.
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines including constructor method factories for route registration, dispatch logic with HEAD handling, and request/response lifecycle management.
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class with req env executionCtx res event error set get var header status body text json html redirect notFound render setRenderer layout methods.
+- Internal names noticed: #rawRequest #req #var #status #executionCtx #res #layout #renderer #notFoundHandler #preparedHeaders #matchResult #path HTMLRespond JSONRespond TextRespond BodyRespond NewResponse TypedResponse ResponseOrInit
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: request context holder that manages response construction state variables and provides typed methods for text JSON HTML body redirects.
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines implementing Context class with private field initialization response construction helpers and typed response method chains.
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class with raw path param query queries header parseBody json text arrayBuffer bytes blob formData valid url matchedRoutes routePath methods. cloneRawRequest exported utility function.
+- Internal names noticed: #validatedData #matchResult bodyCache parseBody #getDecodedParam #getAllDecodedParams #getParamValue #cachedBody GET_MATCH_RESULT InputToDataByTarget ParamKeyToRecord ParamKeys
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: request accessor object that extracts parsed parameters query strings headers body data from the underlying Request with caching.
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines including class implementing path parameter extraction query parsing body content methods and utility function for cloning consumed requests.
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: exports GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol.
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: single-symbol export used as a getter for exposing matched result in HonoRequest class.
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line exporting exactly one unique symbol constant.
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function supporting multipart/form-data and application/x-www-form-urlencoded types. all dot ParseBodyOptions BodyData BodyDataValueDot BodyDataValueDotAll types.
+- Internal names noticed: parseFormData convertFormDataToBodyData handleParsingAllValues handleParsingNestedValues SimplifyBodyData BodyDataValueComponent
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: body parsing utilities supporting form-data url-encoded requests with optional nested object parsing via dot notation.
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines implementing type definitions and parse functions for multipart and form-encoded request bodies.
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function merging multiple middleware into single dispatch chain. takes [[Function unknown]] array errorHandler notFoundHandler.
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch middleware onError onNotFound context.req.routeIndex context.error context.res
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context ./types
+- Plain-English summary: koa-style middleware composition that stacks handlers with dispatch index tracking and error/notFound fallbacks.
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines implementing recursive dispatch function wrapped in factory function accepting middleware array and optional handlers.
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class extending Error with res status getResponse method. Options support res message cause.
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions ContentfulStatusCode getResponse Response
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English status: error class thrown for authentication failures and fatal client errors with automatic response creation.
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines defining class that wraps optional response or generates new Response with status and body.
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports hc function, parseResponse DetailedError type exports InferResponseType InferRequestType Fetch ClientRequestOptions ClientResponse client
+- Internal names noticed: hc parseResponse DetailedError ApplyGlobalResponse PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client entry point providing hc proxy builder and type inference utilities for typed fetch calls.
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines exporting 1 function 1 class and 9 type aliases.
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function creating proxy client. ClientRequestImpl class with fetch method supporting query params form json parameters cookies headers.
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy ClientRequestImpl fetch buildSearchParams queryparams pathParams rBody cType removeIndexString replaceUrlParam replaceUrlProtocol deepMerge
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono ../types ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: hc proxy builder that chains path segments into fetch calls with query params body serialization cookie handling and parameterized URLs.
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines including proxy creation function and implementation class handling URL construction body serialization and fetch invocation.
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client hc request types InferResponseType InferRequestType ClientResponse Fetch ClientRequestOptions BuildSearchParamsFn Response TypedURL HonoURL ExtractSchema Endpoint.
+- Internal names noticed: ExpandAllMethod HonoRequest BuildPath BuildPathname HonoURL ParseHostName TrimStartSlash TrimEndSlash IsLiteral ApplyParam IsEmptyObject GlobalResponseDefinition ToEndpoints ModRoute ModSchema PickRoute PickResponseByStatusCode FilterClientResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono ../hono-base ../router, ./types, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English status: extensive type definitions for client-side type inference URL building and response filtering supporting generic client usage.
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines with complex generics for type inference URL protocol/host/port/pathname construction and response status code filtering.
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath replaceUrlParam buildSearchParams replaceUrlProtocol removeIndexString deepMerge parseResponse functions.
+- Internal names noticed: DetailedError fetchRP buildSearchParams isObject ObjectType mergePath replaceUrlParam replaceUrlProtocol removeIndexString deepMerge
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain- English summary: utility helpers for URL manipulation parameter building and response parsing with error handling.
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines with 6 utility functions for string URL manipulation merge logic and parseResponse re-exporting fetchRP.
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP async function returning parsed response data. DetailedError class with statusCode detail code log properties.
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses fetchRP DetailedError detectResponseType jsonRegex ReadableStream
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: minimal ofetch clone that parses response data by content-type and throws DetailedError on non-OK status.
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines implementing content-type detection JSON regex matching and response data extraction with structured error throwing.
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function registering app for service worker fetch events. exports handle function and fire function.
+- Internal names noticed: HandleOptions addEventListener fetch evt.respondWith handle
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono ../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter that addEventListener fetch handler using service worker fetch event interface.
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines providing fire function that binds app to service workers and exports handle helper.
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function creating handler for service worker fetch events. HandleOptions interface with fetch property.
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent handle fetch respondWith globalThis.bind app.fetch
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono ../types ../handler/types
+- Plain-English status: event handler factory that responds with app.fetch result with fallback to global fetch on 404.
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines implementing event handler that wraps app.fetch in async call with 404 fallback logic.
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface extending ExtendableEvent with clientId handled preloadResponse request resultingClientId respondWith properties.
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent FetchEvent waitUntil clientId handled preloadResponse resultingClientId request respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript interface for Service Worker FetchEvent type matching standard Service Worker event properties.
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines defining FetchEvent interface with extendable event base plus client-specific properties.
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answe
